titleStmt.title: SII 19.40: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 40. (A.R. No. 202 of 1906.) PĒRAṄGIYŪR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is much damaged and the sense is obscure in places. The date looks like 13 also. This seems to record an endowment of two plots of land, after their purchase of tax-free from the sabhā of the village [Pēriṅgūr] by Rudra-Divākaraṉ a resident of Eṭṭukkūr, for the daily feeding of seven Brāhmaṇas in the temple of Mūlasthānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ. The management of this gift was vested with the sabhā itself by the donor. This is possibly an inscription of the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu periṅkū yūrār kūṭṭaṅ hmadeyam Eṭṭukkūr Urudradivākaraṉeṉ śrīmūlasthāṉattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku kāṭṭa
nāṉāḻippa ṭiyāka mutukkum neyyamutukkum Āka kkāl vaiyūrk kaṇattārppaṭṭi Eṉṉuṭaiya paṉṉiraṇṭey mukkālum Irāyūrppaṭṭikaḷ nāṭṭu tukkāka vaiytta ceṟuvu Iraṇṭumāka Ittaṉaic ceṟuvu
laiaṟa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṟaiyiliyāka Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟu
ppatāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom sabhaiyom Ippaṭi viṟṟu ṟaiyiṉālum vantamai yaṟak koṇṭu
nicatippaṭi Eḻuvar brāhmaṇarkku nicatam nel Irunāḻi kuttalariciyum nālu kaṟiyum
ḻākkumāka nicatam Uḻakku neyyum Eḻuvarkkumāka Aṭṭuviṉa kuṟuṇiyum rāyamalai Oṉṟum A
ṅ kuṟuṇiyumāka Ippaṭi nicati Eḻuvar brāhmaṇar candrādittaval muṭṭāmai
ppeṟṟomāṉom Ūṭṭa Itu muṭṭil nāṅkaḷiṭṭa bhaikṣam Iddharmmañ ceyvitta nakkaṉ viratoṅka
kuṭuttom Innakkaṉ viraṉ ṉākaṉ śrīmūlasthānaṅkaḷum maṭṭuvatāka
yil śrīmūlasthāṉattey Ūṭṭuvippomāṉom sabhaiyom sabhaikuṟi[ yuḷḷiruntu Eḻutiṉeṉ sa] bhai
Digital edition of SII 19.40 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
